title: BanNetherite
description: it blocks Minecraft crafting recipe netherite tools and armor and also makes it so one mace can only be crafted
body:
# ⭐ BanNetherite — Disable Netherite, Block Upgrades, Limit Maces

**BanNetherite** is a lightweight anti-Netherite plugin built for modern Paper/Spigot servers.
It fully disables **Netherite crafting, upgrades, trims, and usage**, while still allowing **custom plugin/datapack recipes**. Designed for SMPs that want a more balanced, progression-focused experience.

---

## 🔥 Features

✔ **Blocks crafting of all Netherite gear**
✔ **Prevents Netherite upgrade & trim smithing**
✔ **Stops players from using, holding, or equipping Netherite items**
✔ **Fully supports plugin/datapack custom recipes** — only *vanilla* Netherite is blocked
✔ **One-Time Mace Rule** — only **ONE** Mace can be crafted on the entire server
✔ **Prevents Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template usage**
✔ **Silent spam-protected messages** (players don't get flooded)
✔ **Lightweight, zero-lag, drop-in ready**
✔ **Bypass permission:** `nonetherite.bypass`

---

## 🛠️ Configuration

`banned-use:` lets you add or remove items players cannot hold or equip.
Netherite Ingots & Scrap are always allowed.

The plugin automatically saves a small file (`mace-crafted.txt`) after the first mace is crafted to enforce the global mace limit.

---

## 🔧 Works With

* Paper 1.21.8
* Spigot forks
* Custom items & resource packs
* Datapack recipes
* Other recipe-adding plugins

---

## 🧩 Perfect For

* SMPs wanting slower gear progression
* Servers running RPG or survival-hardcore themes
* Worlds where Netherite is intentionally disabled
* Balanced PvP worlds

---

## 🔑 Permission

| Permission           | Description                                |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `nonetherite.bypass` | Allows crafting & using Netherite normally |
